title: Black
tmdbOverview: Unable to see, hear, or speak after a childhood illness, a young woman grows up prone to violent outbursts until an eccentric tutor changes her life.
synopsis: Black (2005) is a drama film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
